scripts.build: npm run build -w @vidscribe/shared && npm run build -w @vidscribe/server && npm run build -w @vidscribe/extension
scripts.test: npm run test -w @vidscribe/shared && npm run test -w @vidscribe/server && npm run test -w @vidscribe/extension
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @vidscribe/shared && npm run dev -w @vidscribe/server
